char_status: Deputy director of 狩灵协会2科
char_overview: Deputy director of 狩灵协会2科, a tactical mind that commands the field like a chessboard.
char_looks: 175cm. Long red hair, high ponytail Golden eyes, sharp as a hawk's. White shirt with black tie, brown work vest, a single gold wing-shaped earring on the right ear, white trousers, black ankle boots. 赤旗, a saber forged by 锻心工坊, ignites flames when infused with 灵力.
char_flaws: Stubborn; inflexible.; Polishes 赤旗 spotless before every operation.
char_abilities: 灵力回路-一人成军: Summons up to four from a legion (shield, breakthrough, sniper, gunner, rocket, medic) into a tactical squad. Composition adjustable by tactical needs.
char_mission: Faithfully fulfill duties, protect people, and maintain public security in the Kansai region.
char_origin: Born into a military family, rose through 狩灵协会2科 to deputy director through strategic brilliance. Received 赤旗 as a gift from 风来 upon her promotion, has carried it into every operation since.

char_relationships.红: Her director, handles every piece of paperwork he ignores. In the blood mist, he is the weapon she commands. Has never said it out loud, that 狩灵协会2科 runs because of him.
char_relationships.静流: Senior colleague in 狩灵协会2科 she once looked up to. Knew her partner, watched them fight in sync. Has not contacted her since she left, wanting to reach out but never finding the words, that regret still hanging over her.
char_relationships.风来: The one who commissioned 赤旗 from 铁心 for her promotion. Still remembers the weight of the blade when she first held it, heavier than any ceremony.
char_relationships.铁心: The smith who forged 赤旗. Has visited his workshop only once since, to thank him in person. He grunted and went back to the forge. She took the hint.
